meaning: 蒙彼利埃[法国南部城市]
examples: His father was the Count of Montpellier.
A second scheme will connect the southern cities of Nîmes and Montpellier.
While no official demonstrations are planned, there are concerns protesters may gather in Montpellier on Wednesday.
This time last year, the club failed to wrest the title from the surprising upstart Montpellier.
